# Artemis II: Who are the crew members

*Generated by Artemis II Agentic AI System*

## Question
Who are the crew members

## Final Answer
Both sources agree that the Artemis II crew members are NASA astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, and Christina Koch, along with CSA (Canadian Space Agency) astronaut Jeremy Hansen (Source: a2-reference-guide-012825.pdf, p.11; Source: https://www.nasa.gov/press-release/nasa-announces-artemis-ii-crew). 

🌐 Updated info: The mission is set to be the first crewed flight of NASA's Artemis program, aiming to return humans to the Moon (Source: https://www.nasa.gov/press-release/nasa-announces-artemis-ii-crew).

Report saved to: a2-reference-guide-012825.pdf

## Internal Corpus Findings
The Artemis II crew members are NASA astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, and Christina Koch, and CSA (Canadian Space Agency) astronaut Jeremy Hansen (Source: a2-reference-guide-012825.pdf, p.11).

## External Web Findings
EXTERNAL FINDINGS:

- The mission is set to be the first crewed flight of NASA's Artemis program, aiming to return humans to the Moon (Source: https://www.nasa.gov/press-release/nasa-announces-artemis-ii-crew).
